llm_instruction: Extract the type of cancer and the treatment stage from the trial data. Return the cancer type and treatment stage as a string, separated by a comma. Do not include explanations.
target_parsed_value: metastatic pancreas cancer, first-line platinum-based regimen

llm_instruction: Check if the patient has received chemotherapy for any abdominal or pelvic tumor. Return 'Yes' or 'No' only. Do not explain your answer.
Check if the patient has stable disease on the post-treatment scan at completion of first line platinum-containing therapy. Return 'Yes' or 'No' only. Do not explain your answer.
Extract the number of weeks of continuous platinum treatment without progression. Return a number only. Do not include units or explanations.
Check if the patient has received previous treatment with PARP inhibitors. Return 'Yes' or 'No' only. Do not explain your answer.
